text.title: RAG Corpus Discovery Interview Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules + 2 terminal conclusions every corpus-discovery-report must enforce.

rule.statement: Synthesis claims rejected when interview count <5.
rule.rationale: Patterns are not detectable with fewer than 5 informants; opinions presented as findings.

rule.statement: Interview prompts anchored on past behaviour; leading or future-hypothetical phrasing ("would you pay…") rejected.
Every interview ships a transcript (recording_url + transcript_id). Notes-only rejected.
rule.rationale: Memory of interviews decays sharply; transcripts make quotes verifiable.

rule.statement: Quotes are verbatim and attributed to transcript_id + timestamp. Paraphrased quotes rejected.
rule.rationale: Untagged quotes cannot be verified; reviewers cannot trace synthesis to data.

rule.statement: Each interview has `consent_recorded=true` with link to signed consent form.
rule.rationale: Without consent, transcripts cannot be retained.

rule.statement: ≥5 SMEs scheduled AND consent forms signed → run the 5-step procedure.
Recent (≤6 months) corpus audit exists OR <5 SMEs available → skip; reference prior audit.
